proof:
-- Use the reverse triangle inequality and the fact that |y - x| < δ ≤ 1
    cases' le_total 0 y with hy₀ hy₀ <;>
    cases' le_total 0 x with hx₀ hx₀ <;>
    simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
    (try { nlinarith }) <;>
    (try {
      cases' le_total y x with h h <;>
      simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
      nlinarith
    }) <;>
    (try {
      cases' le_total x y with h h <;>
      simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
      nlinarith
    })
  -- The rest of the proof is not required as we only need to fill the `hy'` sorry.
  <;>
  norm_num at * <;>
  linarith

have h₁ : |y - x| < 1 := by
    calc
      |y - x| < δ := hy
      _ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have h₂ : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| = |x + (y - x)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by apply abs_add
      _ < |x| + 1 := by linarith
      _ = |x| + 1 := by rfl
  exact h₂

-- Prove that |x² + xy + y²| ≤ 3|x|² + 3|x| + 1 using the fact that |y - x| < 1
      cases' le_total 0 (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2) with h₆₆₁ h₆₆₁ <;>
        cases' le_total 0 x with h₆₆₂ h₆₆₂ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 y with h₆₆₃ h₆₆₃ <;>
            simp_all only [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
              (try { nlinarith }) <;>
                (try {
                  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x + y), sq_nonneg (x - 1),
                    sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1)]
                }) <;>
                  (try {
                    cases' le_total 0 (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2) with h₆₆₄ h₆₆₄ <;>
                      simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos] <;>
                        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x + y), sq_nonneg (x - 1),
                          sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1)]
                  })
    calc
      |y - x| * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| < δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        gcongr
        <;> nlinarith
      _ ≤ (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        gcongr
        <;> nlinarith
      _ = ε := by
        have h₆₇ : 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 ≠ 0 := by positivity
        field_simp [h₆₇]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> linarith
  exact h₆

    calc

      _ ≤ |x| + |y - x| := abs_add x (y - x)
  have h₂ : |y - x| < δ := hy

  have h₄ : |y - x| < 1 := by linarith
  calc
    |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := h₁
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by
      linarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]

have h₁ : |y - x| < δ := hy
  have h₂ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have h₃ : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le h₁ h₂
  calc
    |y| = |x + (y - x)| := by ring_nf <;> simp [abs_add]
    _ ≤ |x| + |y - x| := abs_add x (y - x)
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by
      linarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]

calc
      |y| = |y - x + x| := by
        ring_nf
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
      _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add (y - x) x
      _ < δ + |x| := by
        -- Use the given condition |y - x| < δ to bound |y| in terms of |x|
        linarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]
      _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by
        -- Since δ ≤ 1, δ + |x| ≤ 1 + |x|
        linarith [δle1]
      _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
  have h₃ : |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    -- Use the fact that |y| ≤ |x| + 1 to bound |x² + xy + y²|
    have h₄ : |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      -- Use the triangle inequality and bounds on |y|
      calc
        |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
          -- Apply the triangle inequality to the sum of three terms
          calc
            |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| = |x ^ 2 + (x * y + y ^ 2)| := by ring_nf
            _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y + y ^ 2| := abs_add (x ^ 2) (x * y + y ^ 2)
            _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + (|x * y| + |y ^ 2|) := by
              -- Apply the triangle inequality to x*y + y²
              have h₅ : |x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := abs_add (x * y) (y ^ 2)
              linarith [abs_nonneg (x * y), abs_nonneg (y ^ 2)]
            _ = |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by ring
        _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y| ^ 2 := by
          -- Simplify the absolute values of squares
          simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf) <;>
          (try simp_all [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith)
        _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * |y|) + |y| ^ 2 := by
          -- Use the fact that |x * y| = |x| * |y|
          have h₅ : |x * y| = |x| * |y| := by
            simp [abs_mul]
          rw [h₅]
        _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * (|x| + 1)) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
          -- Use the bound |y| ≤ |x| + 1 to bound |x| * |y| and |y|²
          have h₅ : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := hy'
          have h₆ : 0 ≤ |x| := abs_nonneg x
          have h₇ : 0 ≤ |x| + 1 := by linarith
          have h₈ : |y| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg y
          have h₉ : |x| * |y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
            nlinarith
          have h₁₀ : |y| ^ 2 ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
            have h₁₁ : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := hy'
            have h₁₂ : 0 ≤ |y| := abs_nonneg y
            have h₁₃ : 0 ≤ |x| + 1 := by linarith [abs_nonneg x]
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|y| - (|x| + 1))]
          nlinarith
        _ = |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * (|x| + 1)) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by rfl
        _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
          -- Simplify the expression to 3|x|² + 3|x| + 1
          ring_nf
          <;>
          (try simp_all [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith)
          <;>
          (try nlinarith [abs_nonneg x])
          <;>
          (try nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y])
          <;>
          (try nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, hy'])
    exact h₄
  have h₄ : |y - x| * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| < ε := by
    -- Use the bounds on δ and |x² + xy + y²| to show that |y - x| * |x² + xy + y²| < ε
    calc
      |y - x| * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| < δ * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| := by
        -- Since |y - x| < δ, we can multiply both sides by the non-negative |x² + xy + y²|
        have h₅ : 0 ≤ |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| := abs_nonneg _
        have h₆ : |y - x| < δ := hy
        nlinarith
      _ ≤ δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        -- Use the bound |x² + xy + y²| ≤ 3|x|² + 3|x| + 1
        have h₅ : |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h₃
        have h₆ : 0 ≤ δ := by linarith [δpos]
        nlinarith
      _ ≤ (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        -- Use δ ≤ ε / (3|x|² + 3|x| + 1)
        have h₅ : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := δle2
        have h₆ : 0 ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
        have h₇ : 0 ≤ δ := by linarith [δpos]
        nlinarith
      _ = ε := by
        -- Simplify the expression to ε
        have h₅ : 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 > 0 := by positivity
        field_simp [h₅.ne']
        <;>
        ring_nf <;>
        field_simp [h₅.ne'] <;>
        linarith
  -- Combine all the inequalities to prove the final result
  calc
    |y ^ 3 - x ^ 3| = |(y - x) * (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2)| := by
      rw [h₁]
    _ = |y - x| * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| := by rw [abs_mul]
    _ < ε := by
      -- Use the final bound |y - x| * |x² + xy + y²| < ε
      exact h₄

positivity
      have h₁₃ : 0 ≤ ε := by linarith
      have h₁₄ : 0 ≤ δ := by linarith
      calc
        δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) ≤ (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by gcongr
        _ = ε := by
          field_simp [h₁₂.ne']
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> linarith
    calc
      |y - x| * |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| < δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := h₉
      _ ≤ ε := h₁₀
  exact h₁

cases' le_total 0 x with hx hx <;>
      cases' le_total 0 y with hy hy <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2) with hxy hxy <;>
          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] <;>
            (try { nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y), sq_nonneg (x - y)] }) <;>

                (try {

                    cases' le_total 0 (x - y) with h' h' <;>

                })
  have h3 : |(y - x) * (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2)| < ε := by

      _ < δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        gcongr <;>
          (try nlinarith [abs_nonneg (x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2), abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, abs_nonneg (y - x)])
      _ ≤ (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by

      _ = ε := by

        field_simp [h4.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> nlinarith
  have h4 : |y ^ 3 - x ^ 3| < ε := by

  simpa [abs_sub_lt_iff] using h4
